texto: A rat race is for rats. We're not rats. We're human beings. Reject the insidious pressures in society that would blunt your critical faculties to all that is happening around you, that would caution silence in the face of injustice lest you jeopardise your chances of promotion and self-advancement.
explicacao: Citação de Jimmy Reid sobre temas ligados a autoestima. “A rat race is for rats. We're not rats. We're human beings. Reject the insidious pressures in soc…” articula autoestima, silence, injustice em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e injustice.

texto: Profit is the sole criterion used by the establishment to evaluate economic activity. From the rat race to lame ducks. The vocabulary in vogue is a give-away. It's more reminiscent of a human menagerie than human society.
